nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain before 4am, then a slight chance of snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 30. Northwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Snow likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 36. North wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Snow likely before 7pm, then rain and snow likely between 7pm and 2am. Cloudy. Low around 24, with temperatures rising to around 26 overnight. Southeast wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 40. Southwest wind around 7 mph. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
